title: E-commerce Product Description
scenario: Create an e-commerce product description for a 40-year-old female who is buying a new smartwatch. The description should be 100-150 words long, include a product feature comparison, and use a professional tone.
constraints: Must include a product feature comparison

evaluationCriteria.description: Check that the product description has a professional tone suitable for a 40-year-old female.
Check that the description is within the 100-150 word limit and includes a product feature comparison.
Check that the description is consistent with the voice and tone of a product description for a 40-year-old female.
